hunt-evan.text: Evan Hunt (Democratic) is a candidate for U.S. Representative, TX-03.
As of 2026-07-04, FEC records show Evan Hunt had raised $336,981 and spent $305,935 for this campaign.
No public voting record in our set for Evan Hunt (not currently a member of Congress).

self-keith.text: Keith Alan Self (Republican) is the current officeholder running for U.S. Representative, TX-03.
As of 2026-07-04, FEC records show Keith Alan Self had raised $504,420 and spent $482,950 for this campaign.

On 7-Jan-2025, Keith Alan Self voted Yea on H R 29. A Yea vote required federal detention of unauthorized immigrants charged with theft, burglary, larceny, or assaulting a law enforcement officer, and let state attorneys general sue the federal government over certain immigration enforcement decisions.

base.summary: This is the U.S. House race for TX-03. In the most recent election (2024-11-05), Keith Self (REP) won by about 24.91 points out of 380747 votes cast. The bullets below summarize each current candidate's public finance and voting-record data where available.
base.caveats: This summary only includes facts found in our sourced dataset (FEC finance filings and U.S. House Clerk roll-call votes). It omits anything we could not verify from those sources. No public data in our set on any candidate's policy positions for this race (the positions field was empty for every candidate as of this build). No public data in our set on Evan Hunt's policy positions. No public data in our set on Keith Alan Self's policy positions.
